docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BOGDONOFF, LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT REDDIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LEONARD BOGDONOFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT REDDIT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONA BELLOW, (CONTENT POLICY LEAD). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR A THE HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT REDDIT
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT REDDIT
ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85 SERVED NOV-16-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REDDIT
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
